use_cases: Submitting forms in SaaS dashboards with primary and secondary button variants
File upload interfaces requiring destructive actions for error handling
Navigation actions with ghost and link variants in content-heavy applications
Mobile-responsive action triggers in e-commerce checkout flows
Accessible button actions with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component built on Radix UI's Slot primitive with CVA-powered variant and size system. Features six variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and four sizes, with smooth transitions and focus-visible keyboard navigation. Includes subtle shadow styling and hover state support. Designed as an atomic building block for file upload interfaces and form systems.
